# `DisableCIAInterrupts`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128,X16  
**Parameters:** `—`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>DisableCIAInterrupts();</h3>
<ul>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Disables CIA interrupts. The same as example below.</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
ldy #$7f    ; $7f = %01111111");
sty $dc0d   ; Turn off CIAs Timer interrupts
sty $dd0d   ; Turn off CIAs Timer interrupts
lda $dc0d   ; cancel all CIA-IRQs in queue/unprocessed
lda $dd0d   ; cancel all CIA-IRQs in queue/unprocessed
</code>


</div>
